service.description: Backend job: publish all READY social posts across all tenants whose scheduledDate is in the past (or unset). Designed to run as a Moqui ServiceJob — no user context required. Credentials are looked up per post using the post's own ownerPartyId. Errors per post are recorded but do not abort the batch.

service-call.name: update#growerp.marketing.SocialPost
service-call.in-map: [postId: post.postId, status: 'PUBLISHED', publishedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, publishedUrl: publishResult.publishedUrl, publishError: null, lastModifiedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

service-call.name: update#growerp.marketing.SocialPost
service-call.in-map: [postId: post.postId, publishError: publishResult.errorMessage ?: 'Unknown error', lastModifiedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

service.description: Publish a social post to its configured platform. Routes to platform-specific service based on post.platform. On success updates status to PUBLISHED and sets publishedDate/publishedUrl. On failure sets publishError and leaves status unchanged.

return.message: No platform set on social post ${postId}
No PlatformConfiguration found for platform ${post.platform}. Please configure credentials first.

service-call.name: update#growerp.marketing.SocialPost
service-call.in-map: [ postId: postId, status: 'PUBLISHED', publishedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp, publishedUrl: publishResult.publishedUrl, publishError: null, lastModifiedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp ]

service-call.name: update#growerp.marketing.SocialPost
service-call.in-map: [ postId: postId, publishError: publishResult.errorMessage, lastModifiedDate: ec.user.nowTimestamp ]

service.description: Create a draft post on Substack via private API
Publish a post to LinkedIn via UGC Posts API v2
